name: Indoor Links At Lost Nation
about: Indoor Links At Lost Nation offers year-round golf simulation across two Northeast Ohio locations, providing a realistic golf experience with advanced technology. The facility features computer-controlled laser sensors that track ball speed, trajectory, and spin to ensure a true read of all shots, allowing golfers to experience the physics of outdoor play indoors. Available from November through April, the venue operates on a bay-hour pricing model with rates varying by time of day and day of week, making it accessible for both casual players and serious golfers looking to practice or play in a climate-controlled environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Realistic ball tracking with computer-controlled laser sensors
Quick play times with automatic shot positioning
Wide variety of prestigious golf courses available
On-site leagues and professional coaching options

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned (BYOB not confirmed)

simulator_hardware.notes: Computer-controlled laser sensor system for tracking ball speed, trajectory, and spin

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary rental clubs are available, though you can also use your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information about outside food or drink is provided on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full round of 18 holes takes approximately one hour in the simulators for an average golfer, with about an hour added per person when playing with friends or colleagues.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers various youth programs and is part of a multi-sport complex that caters to families.
